stable_spec: Clear straight-grain stock at least 34 in long and 7/8 in final thickness; quartersawn preferred
supplier_candidates: Local hardwood dealer; Woodcraft; Rockler; specialty tonewood supplier
verification_needed: Verify board width/defect-free yield before purchase
notes: Buy enough extra for C3/A4/C6 pilot bars and tuning failures.

stable_spec: Hard maple or cherry at 7/8 in final thickness
notes: Use only for material study or education build, not direct swap without validation.

stable_spec: PVC or aluminum tubes in selected bores from about 1.25-2.00 in or revised bore set
verification_needed: Verify ID/OD, wall thickness, cap availability, and cut length
notes: Current workbook lengths use a bore proxy; update after selecting tube sizes.

stable_spec: Adjustable or removable closed end matching tube ID
verification_needed: Confirm air seal and tuning adjustability
notes: Prototype with removable caps before permanent end caps.

stable_spec: Hard maple or stable hardwood rail stock
verification_needed: Confirm straightness and final rail length
notes: Frame geometry is still CAD-driven TBD.

stable_spec: Low-stretch braided synthetic cord sized for 1/4 in support holes
supplier_candidates: Music hardware supplier; climbing accessory cord supplier
notes: Must not buzz against bar holes.

stable_spec: Silicone/rubber tubing or grommets sized to isolate bars
3/4 in carbide ball-end mill suitable for hardwood
supplier_candidates: Amana; Whiteside; Onsrud; local tooling supplier
verification_needed: Verify shank, flute length, machine collet, and feeds/speeds
notes: Use actual bit geometry in CAM.

stable_spec: 1/4 in carbide downcut spiral for clean top edges
verification_needed: Verify cut length and chip evacuation
notes: Profile passes need tabs or fixture retention.

stable_spec: Thin oil/shellac/lacquer finish compatible with tuned bars
verification_needed: Test on offcuts for pitch shift
